title: Create and Switch Branches
description:
## Work on a Feature Branch

A repository with one commit on `main` is ready at **`/root/branchrepo`**.

**Your task:** create a new branch named **`feature/login`** and switch to it, so it becomes the current branch.

> 💡 `git switch -c <name>` (or `git checkout -b <name>`) creates and checks out a branch in one step. Confirm with `git branch --show-current`.

hints.title: Create and switch
hints.body: The -c flag of git switch creates the branch and moves you onto it.

setup_commands.command: cd /root/branchrepo && echo hello > file.txt && git add file.txt && git commit -m init

validation.description: Checks that the current branch of /root/branchrepo is feature/login.
